reported_entities.name: Global Legal Entity Identifier Foundation (GLEIF)
reported_entities.claim: GLEIF's official website homepage is https://www.gleif.org/en (canonical domain gleif.org). GLEIF is a supra-national, not-for-profit organization established in 2014 by the Financial Stability Board (FSB), overseen by the Regulatory Oversight Committee (ROC), that supports implementation of the Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) and verifiable LEI (vLEI).

notes: Single WebSearch query 'GLEIF Global Legal Entity Identifier Foundation official website' returned gleif.org as top result (Home – GLEIF, and About GLEIF page both on same domain), consistent with widely-known public information. High confidence, no further verification queries needed.
